use_cases: Displaying important announcements or system messages to users
Showing success, warning, or info notifications with contextual styling
Auto-dismissing promotional or premium content after a set duration
Creating closable alerts with custom icons and action buttons
Providing contextual feedback based on user actions or system states
ai_summary: A versatile banner component with multiple variants for displaying contextual notifications, alerts, and announcements. Supports auto-hide functionality, closable behavior, and customizable content including icons and action buttons. Features semantic color variants for success, warning, info, and premium messaging, making it suitable for dashboards, landing pages, and notification systems across SaaS and e-commerce platforms.
